purpose: Product on stacked ceramic plinth. Designer object positioning.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Modern designer product photography of {product_descriptor} balanced on stacked cream ceramic geometric plinth (two stacked rounded ceramic forms creating organic pedestal), soft directional natural light from upper right, neutral cream gradient background, shot on 85mm at f/5.6, contemporary design aesthetic, no text, no watermark, no people {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T52. Saudi adaptation guidance: Ceramic aesthetic culturally appropriate (Saudi pottery traditions in Najd) while reading contemporary. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per month.
